  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    City
    Represents a City structure in the game world.
    CityTest
    Test class for the City class.
    CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException
    Thrown when the requested grid coordinates fall outside the valid boundaries of the world map.
    CreateStructure
    Factory and utility class responsible for instantiating game structures and retrieving their baseline costs and requirements.
    CreateStructureScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering the structure selection menu.
    CreateStructureTest
    Test class for the CreateStructure class.
    EndScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering the game over screen.
    ErrorPopUp
    Utility dialog component responsible for rendering standardized error notifications.
    Events
    Represents the events that occur throughout the game.
    EventsTest
    Test class for the Events class.
    FileHandler
    Handles all file input and output operations for saving and loading game sessions.
    FileHandler.SaveData
    Container class used to securely encapsulate and return the parsed game data upon a successful load operation.
    FileHandlerTest
     
    Forest
    Represents a Forest structure in the game world.
    ForestTest
    Test class for the Forest class.
    GameEngine
    Utility class responsible for managing core game logic and validating action requests performed by the players.
    GameEngineTest
    Test class for the GameEngine class.
    GameException
    Base exception class for all generic and custom game logic violations.
    GameSession
    Manages the core game state, including player turns, day progression, and invoking the event system to update game modifiers.
    GameSessionTest
    Test class for the GameSession class.
    InsufficientAPException
    Thrown when a player attempts to perform an action without having the required amount of Action Points (AP).
    InsufficientResourcesException
    Thrown when a player attempts to construct or upgrade a structure without having the required amount of specific material resources.
    Launcher
     
    Main
    The main entry point for the JavaFX application.
    MainGameScreen
    The primary gameplay interface controller and view dashboard.
    MapCellScreen
    Controller and view class that handles the contextual action menu for a selected map tile.
    Mine
    Represents a Mine structure in the game world.
    MineTest
    Test class for the Mine class.
    Player
    Represents a player within the game session.
    PlayerTest
    Test class for the Player class.
    Ranch
    Represents a Ranch structure in the game world.
    RanchTest
    Test class for the Ranch class.
    ResourceType
    Defines the types of resources available within the game economy.
    SearchResourcesScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering the resource gathering interface.
    SelectPlayersNameScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for handling player identity registration.
    SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException
    Thrown when a player attempts to place or construct a structure on a map tile that is already occupied by another structure.
    StartScreen
    The primary entry-point viewport and main menu controller.
    StructureDontExistException
    Thrown when an operation attempts to interact with or retrieve a structure from a map coordinate that is currently empty.
    Structures
    Abstract baseline class for all architectural structures within the game world.
    StructuresBaseTest
    Test class for the base Structures class.
    StructuresBuildingInfoScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering structural construction blueprint specifications.
    StructureScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for displaying the inspection properties of an existing building structure deployed on the map grid.
    StructuresType
    Defines the categories of architectural structures that can be built on the map grid.
    UnauthorizedActionException
    Thrown when a player attempts to perform an action or interaction on a structure that belongs to another player.
    UpgradeStructureScreen
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering structural upgrade paths and statistics comparisons.
    WorldMap
    Responsible for creating, maintaining, and managing the core game world grid.
    WorldMapTest
    Test class for the WorldMap class.
